# Wander Atlas

> Wander Atlas (https://wanderatlasguides.com) is an editor-reviewed, AI-assisted travel guide to destinations worldwide. Every guide opens with an answer-first summary, then gives verified facts sourced from live Google Places (ratings, addresses, price level), practical "how to get there" and "what to eat" details, and a FAQ. Coverage spans cities across South Korea, Japan, Thailand, Vietnam, Italy, France, Spain, China, the United States and Indonesia, with more countries added continuously.

Facts such as ratings, addresses and hours come from live Google Places data and can change — verify before visiting. Images are licensed or public domain. Guides are produced with AI assistance and reviewed against official sources by the Wander Atlas editorial team. Content is in English; the homepage is available in English, Korean, Japanese, Spanish and Chinese.

## Destinations
- [All destinations](https://wanderatlasguides.com/destinations): Browse every country and continent we cover
- [South Korea](https://wanderatlasguides.com/destinations/south-korea): Seoul, Busan, Jeju, Gyeongju, Incheon, Jeonju and more
- [Japan](https://wanderatlasguides.com/destinations/japan): Tokyo, Kyoto, Osaka, Sapporo, Fukuoka, Hiroshima and more
- [Thailand](https://wanderatlasguides.com/destinations/thailand): Bangkok, Chiang Mai, Phuket, Krabi, Ayutthaya and more
- [Vietnam](https://wanderatlasguides.com/destinations/vietnam): Hanoi, Ho Chi Minh City, Da Nang, Hoi An and more

## Travel essentials
- [Visa & entry](https://wanderatlasguides.com/essentials/visa): Visa-free rules, e-arrival cards, entry requirements
- [Getting around](https://wanderatlasguides.com/essentials/transport): Transit cards, trains, subways and map apps
- [Money & costs](https://wanderatlasguides.com/essentials/money): Cards vs cash, ATMs, tipping, tax refunds
- [Best time to visit](https://wanderatlasguides.com/essentials/best-time-to-visit): Seasons, weather, festivals
- [Emergency & help](https://wanderatlasguides.com/essentials/emergency): Emergency numbers and traveler help lines

## Tools
- [Flights](https://wanderatlasguides.com/flights): Search live flight prices to any destination
- [Free trip-planning checklist](https://wanderatlasguides.com/free/trip-checklist): A printable pre-trip checklist

## About
- [Editorial policy](https://wanderatlasguides.com/about): How our guides are made and reviewed
- [Contact](https://wanderatlasguides.com/contact): Reach the editorial team
- [Sitemap](https://wanderatlasguides.com/sitemap-index.xml): Full list of indexable pages
